projectDescription: A React Native mobile app that helps CUCEI university students navigate the campus, access student services, connect with the community, and get AI-powered assistance.
keyFeatures: Interactive SVG campus map with pan and zoom for navigating CUCEI buildings and facilities
Step-by-step route navigation with associated video guides for each route
AI-powered CUCEI assistant chatbot (Stack AI integration) for campus questions
User authentication with registration, login, and persistent session management
Student services hub covering scholarships, social service, medical services, and CID
Community section with articles and a staff/department directory
CUCEI Radio integration and curriculum (malla curricular) viewer by degree
Customizable user profile with avatar selection and degree information
Onboarding flow for first-time users with animated introduction screens
Supabase backend integration for data storage and user management
publicApiSurface: listDegrees() — fetch all available degree programs
findUserByEmail(email) — look up a user account by email address
findUserByUsername(username) — look up a user account by username
findUserByCode(code) — look up a user account by numeric code
findUserById(userId) — fetch a single user record by ID
insertUser(userData) — create a new user account
updateUser(userId, userData) — update an existing user's profile
updateUserPassword(userId, newPasswordHash) — change a user's password hash
getAllUsers() — retrieve all user records (admin use)
registerUser(userData) — full registration flow with validation and duplicate checks
validateUsername(username) — validate username format and length
getSession() / setSession() — manage user session via AsyncStorage
HomePage map points — interactive campus building coordinates and aliases
handleSearch(routeObject) — activate a campus navigation route with video
